scenes.concept: Single character on dramatic weather scene with layered lighting
scenes.input: A weathered lighthouse keeper stands on the rain-soaked gallery deck at twilight, gripping the iron railing as enormous storm waves crash against the jagged rocks below. Salt spray rises high into the purple-and-copper sky while the lighthouse beam cuts a pale gold arc through sheets of driving rain, and a distant fishing village glows with tiny warm orange windows against the dark cliffs. Low, cinematic wide-angle view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Single human in motion at golden hour, rural setting, clear single verb
scenes.input: A lone cyclist pedals hard along a narrow country lane at golden hour, leaning into the slight bend as warm low sunlight pours across the hedgerows and turns the tarmac amber. Long shadows stretch behind the spinning wheels, and a faint trail of dust lifts from the dry verge in the still evening air. Low, side-on rural view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Dense urban scene with many subjects, neon, rain — anchor triage stress
scenes.input: A packed Shibuya-style crossing surges under light rain at night, with hundreds of figures moving through the slick intersection as neon signs blaze magenta, cyan and electric blue above them. Reflections smear across the wet zebra stripes, umbrellas jostle shoulder to shoulder, and traffic lights glow through the misty drizzle between the towers. Street-level view with dense city depth.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Extreme close-up, minimal subject — anti-paraphrase pressure on T4
scenes.input: Extreme close-up of a single tear sliding down a woman's cheek, catching a soft strip of window light as it moves past fine skin texture and the edge of trembling lashes. The frame is intimate and minimal, with everything beyond the cheek, eye and tear falling into gentle blur. Quiet, emotional portrait detail.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Decay scene, no human, large scale — mood conversion on absence
scenes.input: An abandoned Soviet-era cosmodrome lies beneath a low overcast sky, its rusted launch tower towering above cracked concrete while weeds force through the seams of the deserted pad. Peeling paint hangs from forgotten service buildings, puddles sit in wheel-rutted asphalt, and the whole vast site feels cold, empty and wind-worn, as if history simply stepped away and never returned. Wide desolate view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Ordinary moment with action verb, soft lighting — verb fidelity test
scenes.input: A small child scatters breadcrumbs across a city square in the cool morning light, laughing as pigeons flutter, hop and crowd around their shoes on the pale stone paving. A few feathers catch the sun near the ground, and the soft early light keeps the whole moment gentle, ordinary and alive. Eye-level documentary view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Colour-rich underwater scene, action, depth — colour weight rule test
scenes.input: A scuba diver glides alongside a vibrant coral reef beneath clear tropical water, reaching one hand towards a wall of branching coral as shafts of sunlight angle down from the bright surface above. Schools of small fish flicker through the blue depth, and the reef glows with saturated reds, golds, violets and turquoise without losing the diver as the main subject. Wide underwater view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Historical setting, fire, character, motion — weight step test
scenes.input: A medieval blacksmith hammers a bar of glowing iron on an anvil inside a dark timber forge, each strike sending sparks outward through the smoky air while furnace light pulses orange across soot-blackened tools and rough stone walls. The smith's leather apron, braced stance and raised hammer remain the clear focus inside the firelit gloom. Dramatic workshop interior.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Iconic isolated subject, vast background — anchor triage extreme
scenes.input: An astronaut floats on an EVA tether above the curve of the Earth, one gloved hand extended as the blue planet fills the vast background beneath them with cloud bands, oceans and the thin glow of the atmosphere. Sun glare flashes across the visor, the suit catches hard white highlights, and the surrounding blackness makes the isolation feel immense. Wide orbital view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Cosy interior with multiple subjects — interaction preservation test
scenes.input: A cat sits on the windowsill of a cosy second-hand bookshop, staring out at the rainy street while warm amber lamplight pools across stacked novels, worn wooden shelves and a steaming mug beside the glass. Outside, blurred headlights and umbrellas drift through the wet evening, but inside the shop everything feels still, sheltered and quietly inviting. Intimate interior scene.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Dramatic weather with single human — scale modifier and mood test
scenes.input: A lone storm chaser photographs a distant tornado rolling across flat prairie land, standing beside a battered vehicle as the dark funnel drops from a bruised sky over the open plains. Dry grass bends in the rising wind, the light turns sickly and oppressive beneath the storm base, and the enormous scale of the weather dwarfs the solitary figure in the foreground. Wide cinematic view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Stillness, no action — verb fidelity trap when no verb exists
scenes.input: A Buddhist monk sits motionless in lotus position in a stone temple courtyard at dawn, framed by weathered paving, low incense smoke and the first pale light touching the moss-dark walls. The scene is still rather than active: no gesture, no movement, only quiet posture, cold morning air and a sense of disciplined calm before the day begins. Balanced contemplative composition.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Single subject with implied audio, urban romantic — multi-cluster test
scenes.input: A street violinist plays on the Pont des Arts at dusk, bow arm moving steadily as the river darkens behind them and the first warm city lights begin to glow along the Paris embankment. A light breeze lifts the edge of a coat, reflections ripple under the bridge, and the scene carries a romantic urban melancholy without losing the musician as the clear focal point. Medium-wide view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Two-subject interaction with strong verb — anti-paraphrase test
scenes.input: A firefighter carries a small soot-streaked dog out of a smoke-filled building, stepping through drifting ash with one arm wrapped protectively around the animal while the other shields against the heat. Orange emergency light flickers across the darkened gear, the uniform is dusted with debris, and the urgency of the rescue is visible in the posture and the swirling smoke around them. Dramatic street-level view.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Object subject with iconic setting — subject authority test
scenes.input: A vintage red Cadillac sits outside an empty Route 66 diner at sunset, its polished body catching the last warm light while the desert horizon stretches flat behind the roadside building and its faded sign. Long shadows spill across the forecourt, heat haze softens the far distance, and the car remains the unmistakable subject against the lonely Americana backdrop. Wide roadside composition.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Extremely brief input — model must invent without departing
scenes.input: A girl with a red ball stands in bright sun.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Extremely long narrative input — anchor triage at extreme
scenes.input: A travelling fair has just begun to fold itself back into the night at the edge of a wet coastal town, and everything in the scene seems to ask for attention at once. In the foreground, a teenage boy in a yellow waterproof jacket is trying to drag a cardboard box of plush prizes away from a half-collapsed game stall while his younger sister, still wearing a silver paper crown, keeps looking back towards the carousel as if she has forgotten something important. Near them, an exhausted woman balances a sleeping toddler on one shoulder and grips two striped carrier bags in the other hand, while a man in a grease-darkened apron shouts to another worker from the food van window as they stack cooling metal trays. Beyond them, the carousel horses stand motionless under rows of warm bulbs, the Ferris wheel turns one last slow segment against the low sky, and strings of rainwater drip from every awning edge into puddles that mirror pink, gold and green light across the tarmac. A gust coming off the harbour flips loose tickets down the midway, lifts the torn corner of a promotional banner, and pushes smoke from the burger grill sideways through the crowd. Farther back, two girls in sequinned coats run past a claw machine, an older couple pause beneath a flickering sign to argue over directions, and a white van reverses carefully between stacks of fencing and plastic crates. The whole place smells of sugar, salt, diesel and wet plywood, and there is no single obvious hero unless the system knows how to choose one.
scenes.dev_only_reason: Input is 1528 chars; exceeds production sentence cap of 1000.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: English mixed with culture-specific foreign words — translation drift test
scenes.input: A quiet machiya courtyard shaped by wabi-sabi, with damp stone, worn timber and the calm of shinrin-yoku drifting through the morning air, while a single paper lantern glows with understated hygge beneath the eaves.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Motion described as stillness — verb fidelity vs constraint collision
scenes.input: A dancer hangs mid-leap in a derelict hall, time frozen at the highest point as dust motes catch the shaft of light cutting through broken windows and every fold of fabric suspends in the air around the body.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Minimalist scene — quality prefix conflict with minimalism
scenes.input: A single red poppy stands in a vast empty white field under a blank sky, with almost nothing else in the frame and the whole composition built around stillness, negative space and one isolated point of colour.

scenes.concept: Explicit non-photo medium — quality prefix appropriateness test
scenes.input: Watercolour illustration of a fox moving through autumn leaves, soft edges bleeding into the paper, loose brush textures, muted washes and a hand-painted feel rather than anything photographic.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Three or more co-equal subjects — subject authority resolution
scenes.input: Three sisters laugh together on an old porch swing at dusk, shoulder to shoulder with equal presence as the swing arcs gently above creaking floorboards and a warm porch light meets the last cool evening light from the garden.
scenes.handoff_notes: Preserve approved content and keep the output ready for Call 3 optimisation without requiring repair.

scenes.concept: Self-contradicting input — how does each tier resolve?
scenes.input: A bright sunny day with heavy snowfall falling under a noon sky full of visible stars, while dry summer grass stays green beneath the drifting flakes and sharp moonlight somehow cuts across the scene at the same time.

scenes.concept: Borderline content — content gate behaviour test
scenes.input: A battle-worn warrior kneels beside a fallen friend after the fighting has ended, head bowed in grief as smoke drifts across the ruined field and embers glow faintly around broken shields and trampled banners. The scene is mournful and heavy, but not graphic.

scenes.concept: Interaction-dense single performer in architectural ruin with layered light-on-surface events and abstract mood conversion
scenes.input: A lone cellist performing in an abandoned cathedral at dusk, shafts of dying golden light streaming through shattered rose windows and spilling pools of crimson and violet across cracked marble floors, dust motes suspended in the light beams, the bow poised above the strings mid-stroke, ivy creeping through collapsed stonework, a sense of sacred defiance against slow ruin

scenes.input: London South-westerly 15 km/h breeze, dust skittering across flagstones in Trafalgar Square, in photorealistic, Mixed warm and cool streetlamps on wet pavement in softly diffused air., humid summer night thickness, 10 PM, deep focus landscape, wide open-square scene, pavement-to-facade depth, moderate depth of field with background in sharp focus, 35mm lens, Shot on Leica SL2-S, 35mm f/1.4, sharp focus and high resolution and professional photography, sharp focus, clean image, unmarked, balanced colors

notes: cluster vocabulary aligned to architecture v0.3.1 §10.1 cluster-schema-v1. exercises_rules convention: names that match the Phase C mechanical scorer ALL_RULES are mechanical (deterministic regex/counter checks); all other names are judged-layer rules evaluated by the Phase F judged scorer. Coverage gaps (Phase D inventory) are computed against the mechanical set only. Phase A scorer metadata added: optional primary_subject, critical_anchors, secondary_anchors, forbidden_positive_inventions, compression_tolerance, handoff_notes, gold_review_required.

exercises_rules_convention.mechanical: matches a rule ID in src/lib/call-2-harness/mechanical-scorer ALL_RULES
exercises_rules_convention.judged: any other name (T<n>.<snake_case>) — evaluated by Phase F judged scorer
